steps.title: Separate the two sentences
steps.content: The first sentence can end after Latino advocacy groups. The next sentence begins with Established to protect and advance the rights of Latino Americans, an introductory participial phrase that modifies the two organizations named afterward.

steps.title: Use the participial opener
steps.content: B creates an ungrammatical and established structure. C fuses established directly to groups, and D creates a comma splice between the first clause and the later clause about the two organizations. A period gives the needed sentence boundary. The answer is A.
